Never used on winter, rarely used on summer - only on special circumstances e.g. when there are too many ships in the port.

Survey: May 30, 2015. An uncontrolled zebra crossing was finally added at this exact point. Without it, someone had to walk more than 250m to cross Grigoriou Lampraki Avenue (relatively) safely. Now, If only drivers could respect this crossing.
